decisions_made: SysAdmin as the primary agent identity — persistent partner, not anonymous agent swarm
10-phase roadmap covering identity through full integration
CLI + web hybrid: CLI for speed (daily use), web dashboard for oversight (monitoring)
Multi-model from day one: Claude for reasoning, Codex for bulk generation, Gemini for large context
Mac as agent host, Windows as control plane — separation of concerns
VM (DigitalOcean) as potential alternative or complement to Mac
OpenClaw as multi-channel gateway — integrate, don't build our own
7 Edge Functions with 47 API actions deployed and security-reviewed
next_priorities: Knowledge base population with real domain knowledge
OpenClaw config research for seed creation
